description: Full model with ErrorValue-aware loss and all structural components.
Remove virtual cation-anion interaction edges from the graph cache.
Replace packing/cohesion/transport/thermal latent decomposition with one shared latent.
Replace the thermodynamic structured decoder with a plain MLP readout.
Replace FiLM condition modulation with concatenation-based condition fusion.
Remove the property-specific latent path by disabling learned gates and zeroing property latent inputs.
Remove RDKit global ion-pair descriptor fusion.
Remove explicit cation-anion interaction features: cross-ion edges, bilinear encoder, product term, and difference term.
Remove geometric edge information by disabling E(3)-invariant RBF encoding and zeroing distance edge fields.
Row-level split control; leakage-prone and not a component ablation.
